name: type-b-no-zone
description: 4 categories bullish in IB window, no zone — score hits TypeB band, no zone so TypeA blocked
notes: base=absorption(25)+exhaustion(18)+trapped(14)+delta(13)=70; catCount=4<5 -> confluenceMult=1.0; zoneBonus=0; agreement=1.0; ibMult=1.15 (bars=20<60); score=min(70*1.0*1.0*1.15,100)=80.5; TypeA fails (no zone); TypeB: 80.5>=72 + catCount=4>=4 + deltaAgrees + minStrength=0.8>=0.3 -> TYPE_B
